title: Choose the right real-time protocol
meta_description: Cut real-time latency 60% with the right protocol — WebSocket vs SSE vs polling benchmarks, code, and the one metric to watch first in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets first and pay for it in CPU and reconnect storms.

SSE is simpler but Safari throttles it.

Long polling still works, but it burns RAM.

https://kubaik.github.io/choose-the-right-real-time-protocol
